name: Stonebank
description: '''Michael Stonebank''' (born 17 December 1987), better known simply as '''Stonebank''', is an [[English people|English]] [[Disc jockey|DJ]] and electronic [[Record producer|music producer]]. He is well known for his records on Canadian-based [[electronic music]] [[record label]] [[Monstercat]], for his notability in the UK hardcore genre and scene, and was previously a member of "Zero Hero" along with [[Darren Styles]]. Stonebank previously produced under two former aliases: '''Modulate''' and '''Rocket Pimp'''.
